Arthur et les Minimoys (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $15,132,763Details
International Box Office $98,192,980
Worldwide Box Office $113,325,743
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,214,677
Total $13,214,677
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,294,936 (28.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.52 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:13.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$80,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,247 opening theaters/2,248 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $26,306,379

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 15th, 2006 (Oscar Qualifying Run) by Weinstein Co., released as Arthur and the Invisibles
January 12th, 2007 (Wide) by Weinstein Co., released as Arthur and the Invisibles
Video Release: May 15th, 2007 by Weinstein Co./Genius, released as Arthur and the Invisibles
MPA Rating: PG for fantasy action and brief suggestive material
Running Time: 94 minutes
Franchise: Arthur and the Minimoys
Geographical setting: Underground
Plot point: Cliffhanger Ending, Land Developer, Tiny Worlds
Source material: Novel or Other Work Adapted by Author
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Time period setting: 1960s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production Countries: France
Languages: English
